title: bupleurum raminifolium
intro: Bupleurum raminifolium, a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is also known as Chinese Thoroughwort or Chai Hu. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum raminifolium include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold, and improving liver function. Bupleurum raminifolium is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are typically taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
